company: Pro-Active Cyber Security - Protect Your Business | Cyber Dacians
summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
Cyber Dacians is a cybersecurity firm offering offensive services (penetration testing, red teaming), defensive services (vCISO, hardening, cloud security), and GRC/compliance consulting (ISO 27001, NIST, PCI-DSS, GDPR), including specialized support for government agencies.
